text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey... you know of a good napping spot<n>no one
else will find?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My usual spot is currently, uh...<n>occupied.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: There was this cat... It just looked so<n>comfy...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... It's first come, first serve, right?
